articles.title: He Ran His First Marathon in Under 2 Hours — and Still Got 2nd Place!
articles.summary: Yomif Kejelcha, 28, finished the London Marathon in 1:59:41 — his first marathon ever! He broke the 2-hour barrier but came second because Sabastian Sawe ran even faster.

articles.title: Elon Musk Says It's Not OK to 'Loot a Charity' in Big OpenAI Trial
articles.summary: Elon Musk is suing OpenAI, the company behind ChatGPT. He says its leaders turned a charity into a for-profit business and betrayed their mission to help humanity. The trial started Tuesday in California.

articles.title: Senate Says No to Ending Trump's Cuba Blockade
articles.summary: Senate Republicans voted down a bill that would have made President Trump get Congress's permission before blocking energy to Cuba. The vote was 51-47. Cuba is facing power and water outages.
